reservation.title: Reserve Vehicle
reservation.subtitle: Reserve your dream vehicle with a deposit via bank transfer.
reservation.depositInfo: The deposit is 10% of the vehicle price (min. €500).

wizard.title: Purchase Vehicle
wizard.invoiceSubtitle: Please review the invoice details and proceed.
wizard.signatureSubtitle: Please upload an image of your signature to confirm the purchase.
wizard.signatureHint: Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP (max. 5 MB)
wizard.paymentSubtitle: Please upload proof of your bank transfer (screenshot or PDF).
wizard.paymentHint: Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, PDF (max. 10 MB)
wizard.completedSubtitle: Thank you for your purchase! We will review your documents and contact you shortly.
wizard.completedContact: Feel free to contact us with any questions.
wizard.dragOrClick: Drag a file here or click to select
wizard.contractSubtitle: Descarregue o seu contrato de compra, assine-o e carregue o documento assinado.

wizard.contractDownloadedHint: Contrato descarregado com sucesso. Imprima e assine o documento.
wizard.uploadSignedDesc: Carregue o contrato assinado como PDF ou foto.
wizard.signedContractHint: Formatos aceites: PNG, JPG, WEBP, PDF (máx. 15 MB)
wizard.adminConfirmDesc: A nossa equipa irá rever os seus documentos e confirmar a compra. Receberá um e-mail de confirmação quando tudo estiver concluído.
